series_metadata.series_description: All documents relating to State Term Schedules, Request for Purchase, MLA''s, MMA''s State of Works and Similar documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 10 state fiscal years after the expiration of the contract, then request review by State Archives. ; Paper: Retain for 10 state fiscal years after the expiration of the contract, then request review by State Archives., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
